delta.text:
1114` (replaced the `todo!()` body at line 1094).
- **What `set_top` does:** Sets `
self.top` to the absolute `StackIdx` passed in. If the new top is above the current top, it nil-fills any in
-bounds slots (`cur..min(stack.len(), new_top)`) and extends the stack `Vec` with `StackValue::default()` if
`new_top` exceeds the physical length. Shrinking just lowers `top` (mat
ching the C `L->top.p = newtop` behavior — popped slots are not cleared). The `tbclist`

/to-be-closed close path is intentionally skipped (Phase E).
- **Inner `todo!()`s:** None. Implementation only uses `Stack

Value::default`, `Vec::resize_with`, and direct indexing — no stubbed helpers.
- **
Build:** `cargo build -p lua-cli` is green (warnings only, all pre-existing).

content.text:
Build is green.

**Report:**
- **File modified:** `crates/lua-vm/src/state.rs:1092-1114` (replaced the `todo!()` body at line 1094).
- **What `set_top` does:** Sets `self.top` to the absolute `StackIdx` passed in. If the new top is above the current top, it nil-fills any in-bounds slots (`cur..min(stack.len(), new_top)`) and extends the stack `Vec` with `StackValue::default()` if `new_top` exceeds the physical length. Shrinking just lowers `top` (matching the C `L->top.p = newtop` behavior — popped slots are not cleared). The `tbclist`/to-be-closed close path is intentionally skipped (Phase E).
- **Inner `todo!()`s:** None. Implementation only uses `StackValue::default`, `Vec::resize_with`, and direct indexing — no stubbed helpers.
- **Build:** `cargo build -p lua-cli` is green (warnings only, all pre-existing).
